meta.name: Atlas Go
meta.subtitle: a breadth-first map of the things worth knowing

reader.level: experienced software / AI engineer who builds with coding agents
reader.wants: breadth across CS, systems, software craft, and AI — touch the surface of many things, go deep only where the topic earns it
reader.respect: don't re-explain fundamentals they clearly know (variables, loops, what an API is); do explain the genuinely new idea at the level of a sharp peer

domains.name: CS Foundations
domains.blurb: The load-bearing ideas under everything else — data structures, algorithms, complexity, computation.

domains.name: Systems & Distributed
domains.blurb: How software behaves when it gets big, concurrent, networked, and unreliable.

domains.name: Data & Storage
domains.blurb: Where bytes live, how they're indexed, and the engines that move them.

domains.name: Concurrency & Parallelism
domains.blurb: Doing more than one thing at once without corrupting your own state.

domains.name: Networking & Protocols
domains.blurb: How machines talk, and the agreements that let them.

domains.name: Design & Architecture
domains.blurb: Shaping code and systems so they stay changeable. The decision-maker's domain.

domains.name: Engineering Practice
domains.blurb: Testing, delivery, and operating software that other people depend on.

domains.name: Security
domains.blurb: Assuming an adversary, and designing so they still lose.

domains.name: AI / ML Foundations
domains.blurb: The statistics and learning theory the modern stack is built on.

domains.name: Deep Learning
domains.blurb: Neural networks, how they train, and why they work.

domains.name: LLMs & Generative AI
domains.blurb: The transformer era — language models, retrieval, and how to wield them.

domains.name: ML Systems & MLOps
domains.blurb: Getting models out of notebooks and keeping them alive in production.
